description: A modern, highly responsive desktop UI built with WPF utilizing Material Design for a beautiful invoicing experience.
Follows CQRS principles to encapsulate billing commands (e.g., CreateInvoice) and queries (e.g., GetCustomerBalance) independently.
The core of the application housing fundamental billing entities like Invoices, LineItems, and Customers, entirely decoupled from UI and Storage.
Manages persistent storage using a local, zero-configuration SQLite database via Entity Framework Core, ensuring 100% offline privacy.
